hero.title: Fergana Xim Zashita Antikor LLC
hero.subtitle: Reliable Protection for Industrial Facilities
hero.description: Leading provider of anti-corrosion protection, chemical coatings, sandblasting, and waterproofing in Uzbekistan. Over 50 large-scale projects completed at the country's leading industrial enterprises.

services.section_subtitle: Full-spectrum industrial protection — from surface preparation to specialty coating application

chemical.title: Chemical Protection Works
chemical.short: Application of chemically resistant coatings to protect equipment, tanks, and structures from aggressive chemical environments.
chemical.description:
Chemical protection works are a comprehensive set of measures for applying specialized chemically resistant coatings to metal and concrete structures, tanks, pipelines, and process equipment. The goal is to ensure long-term protection from acids, alkalis, solvents, and petroleum products.

We apply epoxy, vinyl, polyurethane, and phenolic coatings from leading global manufacturers. Full work cycle: diagnostics, surface preparation, primer and finish coat application, adhesion and coating quality control. Warranty period: 5 to 15 years.

sandblasting.title: Sandblasting Works
sandblasting.short: Professional abrasive blasting to Sa 2.5 / Sa 3 grade before applying any protective coating.
sandblasting.description:
Sandblasting works are a mandatory surface preparation stage before applying any protective coating. The quality and lifespan of the final coating depends directly on the quality of the abrasive cleaning.

We use modern mobile sandblasting units and various abrasive materials: steel shot, copper slag, quartz sand. We guarantee Sa 2.5 and Sa 3 cleanliness per ISO 8501. We work on any facility: tanks, pipelines, metal structures, industrial equipment — directly on the customer's site.

painting.title: Paint & Lacquer Works
painting.short: Application of industrial paint and lacquer coatings for protection and finishing of metal and concrete structures.
painting.description:
Paint and lacquer works at industrial facilities are not just decorative finishing — they are primarily reliable protection of metal structures from atmospheric corrosion, UV radiation, and mechanical impact.

We use industrial paint and lacquer materials: alkyd, epoxy, polyurethane, and acrylic enamels and primer-enamels. We work by airless spray and brush application. All coatings are selected based on operating conditions and appearance requirements. Final inspection: film thickness, adhesion, color compliance.

anticorrosion.title: Anti-Corrosion Works
anticorrosion.short: Long-term corrosion protection for metal structures and industrial equipment using world-brand coating systems.
anticorrosion.description:
Anti-corrosion works are one of the key areas of our activity. Corrosion causes enormous economic damage every year. Timely and professional anti-corrosion protection multiplies the service life of equipment and structures.

We apply multi-layer coating systems by Jotun, Hempel, International in accordance with NACE and ISO 12944 standards. Full cycle: structure inspection, protection system design, sandblasting, primer and finish coat application, quality control with as-built documentation.

lining.title: Lining Works
lining.short: Lining of internal surfaces of tanks, vessels, and pipelines with chemically resistant materials to protect against aggressive environments.
lining.description:
Lining works involve cladding the internal surfaces of industrial equipment with special acid-resistant and chemically resistant materials: piece tile (acid-resistant brick, ceramics), sheet polymers (polypropylene, polyethylene, PTFE), or monolithic coatings.

Lining is used where standard paint and anti-corrosion coatings are insufficient — in tanks for storing acids and alkalis, aggressive chemicals, pickling baths, scrubbers, and flue ducts. Our specialists select the optimal lining type based on temperature, concentration, and type of aggressive environment.

thermal.title: Thermal Insulation Works
thermal.short: Industrial thermal insulation of pipelines, tanks, and equipment to reduce heat loss and maintain process conditions.
thermal.description:
Thermal insulation works reduce enterprise energy consumption, prevent condensation, maintain required temperature conditions, and protect personnel from burns.

We work with a wide range of thermal insulation materials: mineral wool, polyurethane foam, foam glass, microporous materials. For external pipelines — aluminum-clad shell systems. For cryogenic equipment — special low-temperature materials. All work is performed to SNiP and EN ISO standards with as-built documentation.

acid.title: Acid Chemical Protection
acid.short: Specialized protection of equipment and structures from sulfuric, hydrochloric, nitric, phosphoric acids and their mixtures.
acid.description:
Acid chemical protection works are a highly specialized field requiring deep knowledge of chemistry and coating application technology. Acids destroy metals and concrete much faster than other aggressive environments, so material and workmanship requirements are especially high.

We apply acid-resistant epoxy and phenolic formulations as well as lining materials — acid-resistant brick on acid-resistant mastic, polymer sheet materials. We work with sulfuric, hydrochloric, nitric, phosphoric, and organic acids. Facilities: acid tanks, pickling baths, neutralizers, flue ducts, floors of chemical production shops.

about.section_subtitle: Over 20 years of reliable protection for industrial facilities in Uzbekistan
about.history_p1: Fergana Xim Zashita Antikor LLC is a leading enterprise in Uzbekistan in the field of industrial anti-corrosion and chemical protection. Over more than 20 years of operation, we have gained invaluable experience implementing complex projects at the country's largest industrial facilities, including oil refineries, chemical enterprises, and energy complexes.
about.history_p2: Our team consists of highly qualified specialists who have been trained and certified under international programs. We use only proven materials from leading global manufacturers and modern technological equipment. Every project is an opportunity for us to confirm our reputation as a reliable and professional partner.
about.history_p3: We work with both state enterprises and private businesses, offering individual solutions for each customer. Our principle: quality, reliability, and long-term partnership.
about.quote: Our approach is not simply applying a coating. We develop a long-term asset protection strategy that pays for itself many times over throughout the entire lifecycle of your equipment.
about.quote_clients: Fergana Oil Refinery · Kungrad Soda · Navoiazot · Mubarek GPZ
